title: Correction to ‘Mod p cohomology theories and the Bockstein spectral sequence’
journal: Mathematical Proceedings of the Cambridge Philosophical Society
abstract: In (1), Theorem 4·1·4, and hence Theorem 4·3·1, are incorrect as stated, unless h* denotes ordinary cohomology theory. However, if h* denotes complex K-theory, corresponding results still hold, provided everything is graded over Z2 instead of Z.
